name: email-campaign
description: Write high-converting email marketing campaigns and follow-up sequences
logic: Step 1: Check for brand-voice.md for tone and audience.
Step 2: Load email-specific triggers (Reciprocity, Social Proof).
Step 5: For each variation, include 3 Subject Lines, Body, CTA, and P.S. line.
Step 6: Ensure body content is under 300 words for cold emails.

parameter_validation.type: Must be: cold, newsletter, followup, or launch
